spells.name: Nether Blast
spells.description: Hurls a bolt of nether energy that bursts on impact, harming everything caught in a small area.

spells.name: Nether Blast (KB)
spells.description: A concussive nether blast that batters a small area and hurls enemies back and into the air.

spells.name: Darts
spells.description: Sprays a rapid stream of nether darts in a straight line, slipping past armor to pepper foes with countless small hits.

spells.name: Darts Lob
spells.description: Lobs an arcing volley of nether darts that rains down onto a distant spot.

spells.name: Nether Darts
spells.description: Looses a swirling flight of nether darts that spiral toward the target.

spells.name: Nether Darts Homing
spells.description: Looses homing nether darts that curve through the air to chase down their target.

spells.name: Raise Skeleton
spells.description: Raises a skeleton warrior from a nearby corpse to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Skeleton
spells.description: Conjures a skeleton warrior out of thin air, needing no corpse.

spells.name: Summon Deer
spells.description: Summons a living deer, a harmless creature called from the wild.

spells.name: Summon Wolf
spells.description: Summons a wolf to fight at your side.

spells.name: Summon Wolf Zombie
spells.description: Raises a rotting zombie wolf to hunt for you.

spells.name: Skeleton Warrior Upgrade
spells.description: Reforges one of your skeletons into a sturdier warrior.

spells.name: Summon Abomination
spells.description: Stitches together a hulking abomination beside you.

spells.name: Sky Lightning
spells.description: Calls a bolt of lightning down from the sky onto a target area, striking through armor.

spells.name: Lightning Zap
spells.description: Zaps a single foe with lightning that can leap on to a nearby enemy, ignoring armor.

spells.name: Lightning Beam
spells.description: Channels a continuous beam of lightning that arcs between nearby enemies, ignoring armor.

spells.name: Elite Skeleton Upgrade
spells.description: Promotes an upgraded skeleton into an elite warrior.

spells.name: Iron Skin
spells.description: Hardens a target's flesh like iron, bolstering its defenses.

spells.name: Quickness
spells.description: Quickens a target so it moves and acts faster.

spells.name: Lucky
spells.description: Blesses a target with fortune, tilting chance in its favor.

spells.name: Life Drain
spells.description: Siphons life from a foe through a draining tether, wounding the victim while restoring vitality, and bypasses armor.

spells.name: Sacrifice
spells.description: Consumes one of your own minions, converting its remains into a burst of healing.

spells.name: Debug Militia Summon
spells.description: Debug tool: instantly summons a squad of militia.

spells.name: Debug Priest
spells.description: Debug tool: summons a priest unit.

spells.name: Debug Skeleton Summon
spells.description: Debug tool: summons a large group of skeletons.

spells.name: Raise Zombie
spells.description: Raises a shambling zombie from a corpse to swell your ranks.

spells.name: Raise Zombie Throng
spells.description: Raises a whole throng of zombies from every corpse across a wide area at once.

spells.name: God Ray
spells.description: Sears a column of holy light down onto undead caught in the area.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: Orders your minions to move to or attack a chosen spot.

spells.name: Regroup
spells.description: Recalls your minions to rally back around you.

spells.name: Ghost Mode
spells.description: Toggles an ethereal ghost form.

spells.name: Necromantic Miasma
spells.description: Conjures a lingering cloud of necromantic vapor that slows and sickens those inside it.

spells.name: Poison Burst
spells.description: Bursts a spray of poison across an area, dealing damage that ignores armor.

spells.name: Paralyze Burst
spells.description: Releases a burst of paralyzing dust that freezes enemies caught in it where they stand.

spells.name: Poison Berries (Poison)
spells.description: Uses poison berries to lace a target with venom.

spells.name: Poison Berries (Paralysis)
spells.description: Uses poison berries to leave a target paralyzed.

spells.name: Reanimate (Imbue)
spells.description: Channels over a corpse, slowly imbuing it back to unlife as a skeleton.

spells.name: Reanimate (Raise)
spells.description: Channels to raise a distant corpse up as a skeleton.

spells.name: Frenzy Potion
spells.description: Throws a frenzy potion, whipping those caught in it into a battle rage.

spells.name: Paralysis Potion
spells.description: Throws a paralysis potion that locks enemies in place.

spells.name: Reanimation Potion
spells.description: Throws a reanimation potion that raises the dead where it lands.

spells.name: Enlargement Potion
spells.description: Throws an enlargement potion that swells those caught in it to giant size.

spells.name: Greater Reanimation Potion
spells.description: Throws a potent reanimation potion, raising a stronger horde from the dead.

spells.name: Poison Potion
spells.description: Throws a poison potion, spreading venom across the area.

spells.name: Death Evolution Potion
spells.description: Applies a death-evolution potion that transforms a minion into a deadlier form.

spells.name: Death Poison
spells.description: Throws a virulent death poison across the area.

spells.name: Blight Bomb
spells.description: Hurls a bomb that soaks the ground with blight, corrupting the land where it lands.

spells.name: Purifying Bomb
spells.description: Calls down a ray of cleansing light that purifies blight from the ground.

spells.name: Purifying Bomb Ex
spells.description: A greater cleansing ray that scours blight from the land.

spells.name: Test Projectile
spells.description: Test spell: a simple exploding projectile.

spells.name: Reanimate Corpse
spells.description: Channels over a corpse to reanimate it into an undead servant.

spells.name: Raise Corpse Puppet
spells.description: Raises a corpse as a puppet held under your direct control.

spells.name: Swift Corpse Puppet
spells.description: Swiftly raises a corpse as a puppet held under your direct control.

spells.name: Fast Raise Zombie
spells.description: Raises a zombie from a corpse with barely a moment's delay.

spells.name: Raise Zombie 1-2
spells.description: Raises a zombie from a corpse.

spells.name: Call the Hunt
spells.description: Sounds the call of the hunt, driving your wolves into a frenzied pursuit.

spells.name: Nimbleness
spells.description: Grants a target growing nimbleness, building up its speed over time.

spells.name: Test Impact
spells.description: Test spell: a projectile that detonates with a heavy knockback shove.

spells.name: Nether Barrage
spells.description: Rains a long-range barrage of nether bolts down onto a distant area.

spells.name: Nether Barrage Swirly
spells.description: Rains a swirling long-range barrage of nether bolts onto a distant area.

spells.name: Spirit Walk
spells.description: Steps into the spirit world for a time, walking untouched as a spirit.

spells.name: Spirit Walk Potion
spells.description: Drinks a potion to briefly walk as a spirit.

spells.name: Glow Line (test)
spells.description: Test spell: draws a glowing line effect.

spells.name: Glow Circle (test)
spells.description: Test spell: draws a glowing circle effect.

spells.name: Skeleton Horde
spells.description: Tears open a gate to the underworld, flooding the battlefield with a horde of skeletal warriors.
